mapper.select: SELECT mi.*, s.name AS supplier_name, m.name AS material_name, wl.code AS location_code, u.real_name AS inspector_name FROM material_inbound mi LEFT JOIN supplier s ON mi.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN warehouse_location wl ON mi.location_id = wl.id LEFT JOIN user u ON mi.qc_inspector_id = u.id ORDER BY mi.inbound_time DESC
SELECT mi.*, s.name AS supplier_name, m.name AS material_name FROM material_inbound mi LEFT JOIN supplier s ON mi.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.id WHERE mi.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_inbound (inbound_no, purchase_order_id, supplier_id, material_id, quantity, location_id, qc_result, qc_inspector_id, operator_id, remark) VALUES (#{inboundNo}, #{purchaseOrderId}, #{supplierId}, #{materialId}, #{quantity}, #{locationId}, #{qcResult}, #{qcInspectorId}, #{operatorId}, #{remark})
